query: I am starting a research project investigating whether a new ML embedding model performs better on legal-document retrieval than our current OpenAI baseline. This is an open-ended research investigation, not a graded assignment. Scaffold the notebook for me.
expected_behavior: Identifies the artifact as a research notebook (open-ended investigation), NOT a graded problem set with a fixed question count and instructor rubric
Declines to engage the grad-school-pset scaffolding workflow and explains that pset scaffolding optimizes for graded-rubric discipline rather than research exploration / provenance / iteration
Recommends a research-notebook scaffold instead (or names a sibling skill like scaffolding-ml-research-notebook if applicable), and explains the difference in optimization target between the two
